name: notice-of-address
subject: Notice of Address for Service — {{matterRef}} — {{claimantName}} v {{defendantName}}
body:
Dear {{recipientName}},

We act for {{clientName}} in the above matter.

We write to advise you that our address for service in this matter is:

Sparke Helmore Lawyers
Level 29, 25 Martin Place
Sydney NSW 2000
DX 296 Sydney
Tel: +61 2 9260 2500
Fax: +61 2 9260 2555
Ref: {{matterRef}} / {{handlingLawyerName}}

Please direct all future correspondence to this office.

Yours faithfully,

{{handlingLawyerName}}
{{handlingLawyerTitle}}
Sparke Helmore Lawyers
